ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session in which the participant is involved */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Current occupation */,
  "native_language" TEXT /* Native language */,
  "additional_languages" TEXT /* Additional languages spoken */,
  "health_conditions" TEXT /* Known health conditions */,
  "consent_form_signed" INTEGER /* Whether the participant has signed the consent form */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date on which the session was conducted */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment conducted in the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session was conducted */,
  "duration" REAL /* Total duration of the session */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the session */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the session */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor or lead researcher for the session */,
  "equipment_status" TEXT /* Status of the equipment used during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus (e.g., image, word) */,
  "stimulus_name" TEXT /* Name of the stimulus */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the stimulus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stimulus */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the stimulus */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the stimulus */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the stimulus was created or added to the database */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the stimulus was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who responded */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stimulus to which the response was given */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken by the participant to respond */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., key press, verbal) */,
  "correct_response" INTEGER /* Whether the response was correct */,
  "word_score_warriner" REAL /* Word score based on Warriner scale */,
  "word_score_pc" REAL /* Word score based on PC scale */,
  "pause_trigger_time" REAL /* Time when the pause trigger was activated */,
  "onset_time" REAL /* Onset time of the stimulus */,
  "offset_time" REAL /* Offset time of the stimulus */,
  "duration_measured_img" REAL /* Duration of the measured image */,
  "duration_measured_word" REAL /* Duration of the measured word */,
  "duration_frames" INTEGER /* Number of frames the stimulus was displayed */,
  "delay_frames_before" INTEGER /* Number of frames before the stimulus */,
  "delay_frames_after" INTEGER /* Number of frames after the stimulus */,
  "img_trigger_time" REAL /* Time when the image trigger was activated */,
  "word_trigger_time" REAL /* Time when the word trigger was activated */,
  "response_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the participant in their response */,
  "response_method" TEXT /* Method used to record the response */,
  "response_context" TEXT /* Additional context or notes about the response */,
  "session_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "session_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_stimulus_id FOREIGN KEY ("stimulus_id") REFERENCES stimuli ("stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emotional_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emotional score */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response to which the score is associated */,
  "positive_score" REAL /* Positive emotional score */,
  "negative_score" REAL /* Negative emotional score */,
  "neutral_score" REAL /* Neutral emotional score */,
  "arousal_score" REAL /* Level of arousal associated with the response */,
  "dominance_score" REAL /* Level of dominance associated with the response */,
  "valence_score" REAL /* Valence (positive/negative) associated with the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emotional_scores_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_details" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the session */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the session */,
  "lighting" TEXT /* Lighting conditions during the session */,
  "noise_level" TEXT /* Noise level during the session */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used during the session */,
  "session_leader" TEXT /* Name of the session leader */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the session */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Detailed description of the environmental conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant providing the feedback */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session for which the feedback is provided */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the participant (1-5) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Whether follow-up is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_feedback_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_feedback_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimulus_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stimulus to which the property is associated */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  "property_source" TEXT /* Source of the property */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stimulus_properties_stimulus_id FOREIGN KEY ("stimulus_id") REFERENCES stimuli ("stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the user within the department */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions or roles assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)
